title: When an automation is creating a new board from a sub item status change allow the new board to use the sub item name
excerpt:
at the current moment with this automation the new board takes the name of the parent item and NOT the sub item. I need something relevant to the subitem; {pulse name} returns the item or activity name only. 
thank you.

posts.author: JPM326 (Jean-Pierre Maufras)
posts.cookedHtml:
